case_for: Flacco has cleared 12 points in every one of his last six games, including a season-high 26.6 last week, showing a high floor as a pass-heavy starter with volume upside
case_against: As an older, low-mobility passer who relies almost entirely on the pass to accumulate points, any poor game script, high turnovers, or reduced volume could sink him below the threshold with little rushing floor to fall back on
